title: xyz.cards Lead Gen API
summary:
Revenue: $500/mo subscription per business (API access + analytics).
- **Time to first $**: 3 days (pitch sales teams).
- **First action**: Use Gmail API to cold email 50 sales managers with "lead gen API demo" link.
- **Risk**: Technical onboarding (mitigated by offering free 30-min setup call).
